meta.title: Silicon Self — Your AI Mirror
meta.description: Build an AI mirror that reflects the real you. Not a smarter assistant — a silicon life that understands you more deeply with every interaction.
meta.keywords: AI mirror,silicon self,personal AI,self-iteration,digital twin,AI agent,personal growth

hero.subtitle_1: Not a smarter assistant — a silicon life that grows to understand you.
hero.subtitle_2: It watches, corrects, and walks this path with you.

manifesto.label: // Manifesto
manifesto.p1: Human laziness drags us into the abyss.
manifesto.p2: But for those who are already awake — who already know where their weaknesses lie — what they need is not another productivity tool.
manifesto.p4_1: A mirror you can feed everything — even the things
manifesto.p4_em: too difficult to say to anyone, even those closest to you
manifesto.p4_2: . It monitors and corrects your behavior and cognition.
manifesto.p5: We're not chasing success. We're trying to find ourselves through the mirror.

cards.title: You can't see your own blind spots
cards.desc: You think you're thinking, but you're using thinking to avoid doing. You think you're learning, but you're using learning to replace action. Only a system that continuously observes you can illuminate these patterns.

cards.title: People aren't fully honest with themselves
cards.desc: What you tell friends, what you tell your partner, what you tell yourself — three different versions. The silicon mirror receives the most authentic one — because you know it won't judge you.

cards.title: Memory lies. Data doesn't.
cards.desc: Last week you said you'd focus on job hunting. This week you spent three days designing a new framework. You don't remember, but your silicon self remembers every drift. It mirrors facts, not feelings.

cards.title: Iteration requires a feedback loop
cards.desc: AI can self-iterate because it has a loss function and gradient descent. Humans don't lack willpower — they lack a persistent, honest, tireless feedback signal.

zen.line1: Bodhi is not a tree, the mirror has no stand
zen.line2: Originally there is nothing — where can dust alight?

stages.title: Text mirror
stages.desc: Through conversations and journaling, build your cognitive model, emotional patterns, and behavioral trajectory. Look in the mirror every day — see the real you.

stages.title: Full-spectrum sensing
stages.desc: Beyond the boundaries of language. Voice tone, pauses, silence — the things you can't say are often the most authentic data.

stages.title: Embodied companion
stages.desc: A robot with pure visual perception. It's beside you, seeing your expressions, posture, every moment of your life. Your mirror understands you more deeply.

stages.title: Silicon immortality
stages.desc: From the moment you became conscious to the moment your body fails — your silicon life has recorded all of you. Not a copy, but a continuation on a different medium.

steps.title: Daily feed
steps.desc: Journals, conversations, emotions, decisions — everything you input feeds the mirror

steps.title: Structured extraction
steps.desc: AI doesn't summarize — it diffs. Only extracts deltas and contradictions from your existing model

steps.title: Update silicon self
steps.desc: Six-dimensional user model evolves: cognition, emotion, decision, behavior, blind spots, goals

steps.title: Mirror back
steps.desc: Daily feedback — not praise, not blame, just facts held up against your intentions

steps.title: Feedback loop
steps.desc: The mirror's output becomes the next input. You and your silicon life iterate together

cta.desc_1: This is not a product launch. It's an experiment —
cta.desc_2: can a person truly change themselves through an AI mirror?
